# Project Brain

<!-- Auto-generated by ai-dotfiles.
     CLI: SessionStart hook loads brain files automatically — no per-turn token cost.
     VSCode / IDE: hooks don't fire; @-imports below inject brain context on every message. -->

## Brain files

| File | Purpose | Update policy |
|------|---------|---------------|
| `OBJECTIVES.md` | Project goals, scope, non-goals | Rewrite when goals change |
| `CONTEXT.md` | Current state snapshot | Overwrite at session end |
| `ARCHITECTURE.md` | Stack decisions, key modules | Update when architecture changes |
| `DECISIONS.md` | ADR log | Append only — never delete entries |
| `ROADMAP.md` | Feature backlog and priorities | Update when scope changes |
| `API.md` | External contracts and endpoints | Update when interfaces change |

Files marked **read at session start** are injected automatically (CLI) or via @-imports below (VSCode).
All files live in `.claude/brain/` and are mirrored to the Local Brain vault at `$BRAIN_PATH/projects/<slug>/`.

## Session start context

@brain/OBJECTIVES.md
@brain/CONTEXT.md
